title: Create logging events at the application boundary
scenario: Domain code should stay free of logging setup. Application boundaries can create events with meaningful fields.
instructions: Implement register_attempt_event that records request_id, optional user_id, and success.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps log-boundary-event explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
